bird.name: 白嘴端凤头燕鸥
bird.summary: 白嘴端凤头燕鸥（学名：Thalasseus sandvicensis）是鸥科凤头燕鸥属的一种鸟类，舊称白嘴端燕鸥。该种与小凤头燕鸥、中华凤头燕鸥、小白嘴端凤头燕鸥(T. acuflavidus)、丽色凤头燕鸥(T.

relations.subject: 白嘴端凤头燕鸥
relations.evidence: It breeds in the Palearctic from Europe to the Caspian Sea, and winters in the Mediterranean and on the coasts of Africa, India, and Sri Lanka
